name: Green Tomato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the sliced green tomatoes in a single layer in an unbaked pie shell.
2. Sprinkle each layer of tomatoes with a mixture of the remaining ingredients: sugar, salt, grated lemon rind, cinnamon, and lemon juice.
3. Cover the layered pie with the top crust.
4. Bake for 35-40 minutes at 350°F in an oven.
